message:
fix(determinism): replace Debug formatting with serde_json in hash inputs

Switch from non-deterministic {:?} debug formatting to serde_json::to_string()
for all struct/enum fields fed into content hashes. Debug output can vary
across Rust versions and is not guaranteed stable, causing hash drift.

Modules updated:
- adversarial_supremacy_synthesis: extend hash to include workload_id,
  size_bytes, severity, claim_id, expected/observed millionths
- bounded_feedback_controller: deadband_override_ns serialization
- frontier_demo_gate: category_coverage and final_decision
- regexp_deterministic_engine: flags and verdict fields
- regime_signature_feature: signature_valid and classified_regime
- hostcall_batch_transport: implement Display for BatchTransportVerdict,
  switch to to_hex()/to_string() from debug format
- entropic_policy_morphing, law_mining, offline_synthesis_pipeline,
  proof_specialization_receipt: consistency improvements

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
